project.name: believe-agency-cms
project.description: Multi-tenant Payload CMS for Believe agency clients

nodes.name: payload.config.ts
nodes.summary: Main Payload CMS config: postgres DB, lexical editor, S3 storage via R2, multi-tenant plugin, nodemailer SMTP, live preview with 3 breakpoints, 6 collections

nodes.name: buildConfig
nodes.summary: Assembles the full Payload configuration with plugins, DB, editor, email, and collections

nodes.name: byTenant.ts
nodes.summary: Two tenant-scoped access control functions: byTenant (authenticated) and byTenantOrPublished (public view published)

nodes.name: byTenant
nodes.summary: Access filter: super-admin sees all, tenant users see only their own tenant's content

nodes.name: byTenantOrPublished
nodes.summary: Access filter: authenticated tenant users see all their content, unauthenticated users see only published items

nodes.name: Pages.ts
nodes.summary: Pages collection: title, slug (unique, home via '/'), allBlocks block builder, SEO group. Versions with autosave drafts. Tenant-scoped access.

nodes.name: Pages
nodes.summary: Payload CollectionConfig for pages: slug 'pages', block-based content, SEO meta, draft autosave, tenant access

nodes.name: Posts.ts
nodes.summary: Posts collection: title, slug, excerpt, coverImage (media relation), richText content, category relationship, publishedAt, readTime, SEO group. Versions with autosave.

nodes.name: Posts
nodes.summary: Payload CollectionConfig for blog posts: slug 'posts', richText content, category relation, tenant access

nodes.name: Media.ts
nodes.summary: Media upload collection: 3 image sizes (thumbnail 400x300, card 768x512, hero 1920x1080), alt text required, caption. Supports image/video/pdf mime types.

nodes.name: Media
nodes.summary: Payload CollectionConfig for media uploads: slug 'media', 3 responsive image sizes, public read

nodes.name: Categories.ts
nodes.summary: Categories collection: name, unique slug, description. Public read, tenant-scoped write.

nodes.name: Categories
nodes.summary: Payload CollectionConfig for post categories: slug 'categories', public read, tenant write

nodes.name: Tenants.ts
nodes.summary: Tenants collection (clients): name, unique slug, domain, logo (media relation), primaryColor, accentColor. Super-admin only for create/update/delete.

nodes.name: Tenants
nodes.summary: Payload CollectionConfig for client tenants: slug 'tenants', brand config, super-admin restricted

nodes.name: Users.ts
nodes.summary: Users collection: email auth (7-day token), name, roles (super-admin, tenant-editor). Super-admin-only role assignment. Self-read for non-admins.

nodes.name: Users
nodes.summary: Payload CollectionConfig for users: slug 'users', email auth, role-based access, 7-day token expiry

nodes.name: blocks/index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel file that imports all 15 blocks and exports them as the allBlocks array for use in Pages collection

nodes.name: allBlocks
nodes.summary: Array of 15 Block configs: Hero, Features, Pricing, Testimonials, CTA, FAQ, Stats, Team, LogoCloud, Gallery, Contact, SplitContent, VideoEmbed, Newsletter, BlogList

nodes.name: Hero.ts
nodes.summary: Hero block: 4 variants (centered/split/video/image-bg), headline, subheadline, CTAs array with style, image, videoUrl, badge

nodes.name: HeroBlock
nodes.summary: Payload Block config for hero sections: slug 'hero', 4 layout variants, CTAs, media, badge

nodes.name: Features.ts
nodes.summary: Features grid block: headline, subheadline, 4 layout options (grid-3/grid-2/list/alternating), items with icon, title, description, optional image

nodes.name: FeaturesBlock
nodes.summary: Payload Block config for feature grids: slug 'features', 4 layouts, icon+text items

nodes.name: Pricing.ts
nodes.summary: Pricing block: headline, plans array with name, price, description, features list, included/not-included, CTA, highlighted flag, badge

nodes.name: PricingBlock
nodes.summary: Payload Block config for pricing tables: slug 'pricing', multi-plan comparison with features and CTA

nodes.name: Testimonials.ts
nodes.summary: Testimonials block: headline, 3 layouts (grid/carousel/masonry), items with name, role, company, photo, quote, rating 1-5

nodes.name: TestimonialsBlock
nodes.summary: Payload Block config for testimonials: slug 'testimonials', 3 layouts, quote + rating

nodes.name: Cta.ts
nodes.summary: CTA block: 3 variants (banner/card/split), headline, subheadline, up to 2 CTAs with style, optional background image

nodes.name: CtaBlock
nodes.summary: Payload Block config for CTAs: slug 'cta', 3 variants, multi-button support, background image

nodes.name: Faq.ts
nodes.summary: FAQ block: headline, subheadline, items array with question (text) and answer (richText)

nodes.name: FaqBlock
nodes.summary: Payload Block config for FAQs: slug 'faq', richText answers

nodes.name: Stats.ts
nodes.summary: Stats block: optional headline, 2-6 metric items with value, label, description

nodes.name: StatsBlock
nodes.summary: Payload Block config for statistics: slug 'stats', 2-6 metrics with value + label

nodes.name: Team.ts
nodes.summary: Team block: headline, subheadline, members array with name, role, photo, bio, social links (LinkedIn/X/Instagram)

nodes.name: TeamBlock
nodes.summary: Payload Block config for team sections: slug 'team', members with photos and social links

nodes.name: LogoCloud.ts
nodes.summary: Logo cloud block: headline, logos array with image + alt + optional URL, optional marquee animation

nodes.name: LogoCloudBlock
nodes.summary: Payload Block config for logo clouds: slug 'logo-cloud', client logo grid with marquee option

nodes.name: Gallery.ts
nodes.summary: Gallery block: headline, 3 layouts (masonry/grid/carousel), images array with caption

nodes.name: GalleryBlock
nodes.summary: Payload Block config for galleries: slug 'gallery', 3 layout options, images with captions

nodes.name: Contact.ts
nodes.summary: Contact block: headline, subheadline, destinationEmail, configurable form fields (text/email/tel/textarea/select), success message

nodes.name: ContactBlock
nodes.summary: Payload Block config for contact forms: slug 'contact', dynamic form fields, email destination

nodes.name: SplitContent.ts
nodes.summary: Split content block: headline, richText body, image, imagePosition (left/right), optional CTA button

nodes.name: SplitContentBlock
nodes.summary: Payload Block config for split layouts: slug 'split-content', text + image with position toggle

nodes.name: VideoEmbed.ts
nodes.summary: Video embed block: 3 sources (YouTube/Vimeo/direct mp4), video ID, poster image, autoplay, fullWidth toggle

nodes.name: VideoEmbedBlock
nodes.summary: Payload Block config for video embeds: slug 'video-embed', YouTube/Vimeo/direct sources

nodes.name: Newsletter.ts
nodes.summary: Newsletter signup block: headline, subheadline, email placeholder, CTA button text, success message, destination email

nodes.name: NewsletterBlock
nodes.summary: Payload Block config for newsletter signup: slug 'newsletter', email capture with customizable labels

nodes.name: BlogList.ts
nodes.summary: Blog list block: headline, 3 layouts (grid/list/featured), count (1-12), optional 'view all' CTA

nodes.name: BlogListBlock
nodes.summary: Payload Block config for blog post lists: slug 'blog-list', 3 layout variants, configurable count and CTA

nodes.name: init-db.ts
nodes.summary: DB schema init script that boots Payload with getPayload to push Postgres schema then exits, run before next start for first deployment

nodes.name: run
nodes.summary: Async function that loads Payload with config to push DB schema, then destroys connection and exits

nodes.name: Multi-tenant Architecture
nodes.summary: Plugin-based tenant isolation: each client (tenant) has isolated content, branding config, and user roles. Super-admin can access all tenants.

nodes.name: Block-Based Page Builder
nodes.summary: 15 reusable content blocks compose pages via Payload blocks field: layout, media, CTA, social-proof, contact, and more

nodes.name: Tenant-Scoped Access Control
nodes.summary: Three-tier access: super-admin (full), tenant-editor (own tenant), public (published only). Applied via Payload access functions.

nodes.name: Roles and Permissions
nodes.summary: Two roles: super-admin (cross-tenant, manage tenants/users) and tenant-editor (scoped to one tenant, content management only)

nodes.name: Cloud Storage and Media Pipeline
nodes.summary: Cloudflare R2 S3 storage for media uploads with 3 auto-generated image sizes, public URL generation, media relation across collections

nodes.name: page.tsx
nodes.summary: Next.js catch-all admin route rendering Payload RootPage with config, params, and import map

nodes.name: importMap.js
nodes.summary: Auto-generated Payload import map registering richtext-lexical, storage-s3, multi-tenant, and next/rsc client components

nodes.name: route.ts
nodes.summary: Catch-all REST API route delegating GET/POST/DELETE/PATCH/PUT/OPTIONS to Payload's nextHandler

nodes.name: layout.tsx
nodes.summary: Root layout for Payload admin wrapping children in RootLayout with server function handler and import map

nodes.name: not-found.tsx
nodes.summary: Next.js 404 not-found page rendering 'Página no encontrada' with force-dynamic export

nodes.name: 404.js
nodes.summary: Legacy Pages Router custom 404 page with inline styled heading

nodes.name: 500.js
nodes.summary: Legacy Pages Router custom 500 error page with inline styled heading

nodes.name: next.config.mjs
nodes.summary: Next.js configuration with withPayload, redirect / → /admin, R2 image remotePatterns, and single-CPU experimental settings

nodes.name: Dockerfile
nodes.summary: Multi-stage Docker build: node:24-alpine base, builder runs importmap gen + next build, slim production runner with next start

nodes.name: .env.example
nodes.summary: Environment variable template for DATABASE_URI, PAYLOAD_SECRET, R2 storage, SMTP email, and preview URL

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Project manifest with Payload 3.x, Next.js 15, React 19, Postgres adapter, multi-tenant plugin, richtext-lexical, storage-s3, and sharp dependencies

nodes.name: tsconfig.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript config with bundler module resolution, Next.js plugin, @/* path alias, and @payload-config alias pointing to src/payload.config.ts

nodes.name: BLUEPRINT.md
nodes.summary: Full architecture blueprint: multi-tenant Payload CMS, 15-block catalog, collection schema, 10-step build order (setup → foundational → story), deployment diagram, and env variables

nodes.name: CONTEXT.md
nodes.summary: Session context documenting operational status: admin URL, stack versions, completed features, collection list, Coolify env vars, and next critical step (Step 8)

nodes.name: NEXT-SESSION.md
nodes.summary: Next session handoff prompt for Step 8: create believe-web-starter repo with Payload API client, BlockRenderer, 15 Flowbite block components, ISR pages, preview/revalidate endpoints, and env template

nodes.name: .gitkeep
nodes.summary: Empty placeholder file keeping public directory tracked in git

nodes.name: Docker Deployment
nodes.summary: Multi-stage Docker image: Alpine + full build with Payload importmap generation + production runner with minimal footprint for Coolify VPS

nodes.name: Payload Admin Entry
nodes.summary: Next.js app router entry points (catch-all page + layout) that bootstrap Payload admin UI with import map and server functions

nodes.name: Payload REST API Entry
nodes.summary: Catch-all route delegating all HTTP methods to Payload's nextHandler for headless API access

nodes.name: Custom Error Pages
nodes.summary: Spanish-language 404 and 500 error pages for both App Router (not-found.tsx) and legacy Pages Router (404.js, 500.js)

nodes.name: Environment Configuration
nodes.summary: Required env vars: Postgres DB URI, Payload secret, R2 S3 storage, Plunk SMTP email, and frontend preview URL

layers.name: Configuration Layer
layers.description: Project configuration files: Next.js, TypeScript, env template, package manifest, and env config concept

layers.name: Payload CMS Core
layers.description: Main Payload configuration assembling plugins (multi-tenant, storage-s3, richtext-lexical), DB adapter, email, editor, and core architectural concepts

layers.name: Data Collections
layers.description: Payload collection schemas defining the data model: Pages, Posts, Media, Categories, Tenants, Users

layers.name: Content Blocks
layers.description: 15 reusable block schemas for composable page building (Hero through Newsletter) plus barrel export and page-builder concept

layers.name: Access Control
layers.description: Tenant-scoped authorization logic: byTenant and byTenantOrPublished functions, RBAC concepts

layers.name: Admin Panel Entry Points
layers.description: Next.js App Router routes that bootstrap the Payload admin UI with layout, catch-all page, and import map

layers.name: REST API Layer
layers.description: Catch-all API route delegating all HTTP methods to Payload's nextHandler for headless access

layers.name: Error Pages
layers.description: Custom 404 and 500 error pages for App Router and legacy Pages Router

layers.name: Deployment Infrastructure
layers.description: Multi-stage Docker build, DB schema init script, and Docker deployment concept for Coolify VPS

layers.name: Static Assets
layers.description: Public directory placeholder and static file assets

layers.name: Documentation
layers.description: Architecture blueprint, session context, and next-session handoff

tour.title: Architecture Blueprint
tour.description: Start with the BLUEPRINT to understand the vision, architectural decisions, and implementation roadmap for the multi-tenant CMS.

tour.title: Payload CMS Configuration
tour.description: The central configuration wires together Postgres, S3 storage, multi-tenant plugin, Lexical editor, email, and all 6 collections.

tour.title: Data Collections
tour.description: The 6 collections define the data model: Tenants (clients), Users (editors), Pages, Posts, Media (uploads), and Categories.

tour.title: Content Blocks
tour.description: 15 reusable blocks (Hero, Features, Pricing, Testimonials, CTA, FAQ, Stats, Team, LogoCloud, Gallery, Contact, SplitContent, VideoEmbed, Newsletter, BlogList) create a flexible page-building system.

tour.title: Multi-Tenant Access Control
tour.description: Tenant-scoped authorization: byTenant filters content per tenant, byTenantOrPublished allows public read for published content.

tour.title: Admin Panel & API
tour.description: The Next.js app hosts the Payload admin panel and REST API routes via catch-all handlers.

tour.title: Cloud Storage & Media Pipeline
tour.description: Cloudflare R2 S3 storage with 3 auto-generated image sizes powers media across all collections and blocks.

tour.title: Deployment & Infrastructure
tour.description: Multi-stage Docker build deploys on Coolify VPS. init-db.ts seeds the schema. Next.js config redirects root to /admin.

tour.title: Next Steps & Frontend
tour.description: Step 8 calls for a Next.js + Flowbite frontend starter: block renderer, ISR pages, webhook revalidation, and live preview.
